! Title: ShieldNova - Services / Spotify
! Description: Domain set for Spotify traffic routing.
! Author: Harry (https://github.com/harryheros)
! Homepage: https://github.com/harryheros/shieldnova
! License: CC BY-NC-SA 4.0
! Profile: Conservative / Compatibility-First
! Built: 2026-04-26 02:45:09 UTC
! Total: 8
! Breakdown: service_rules=8

! Spotify
! Purpose: service-specific routing for proxy tools.
! This is NOT a blocking list.

||spotify.com^                            ! Spotify - main platform
||scdn.co^                                ! Spotify - static CDN
||spoti.fi^                               ! Spotify - short links
||audio-ak-spotify-com.akamaized.net^     ! Spotify - audio delivery
||heads-ak-spotify-com.akamaized.net^     ! Spotify - audio delivery
||audio4-ak-spotify-com.akamaized.net^    ! Spotify - audio delivery
||ap-gew4.spotify.com^                    ! Spotify - access point
||dealer.spotify.com^                     ! Spotify - real-time updates
